creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
>   BTW I have a new patch with ETCDIR macro implementation.

Hmm now I'm not sure how useful this is - we don't require ports to
create subdir under PREFIX/etc ..

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

A computer programmer is a device for turning requirements
into undocumented features. It runs on cola, pizza and Dilbert cartoons.
  -- Bram Moolenaar
